creator: bsdkaffee@gmail.com
text:
- Update finance/gnucash to 2.4.2
- Add LICENSE (GPLv3)
- Streamline dependencies
- Use Gwenhywfar 4.x / AqBanking 5.x
- Provide option to use Webkit instead of gtkhtml3
- Provide option to install Python bindings
- SQL database support is now provided by databases/libdbi
- Add pkg-message to explain that databases/libdbi-drivers must be installed
  to use SQL backends. XML file will still be available even if they are not
  installed.

Note:
Gwenhywfar 4.x and AqBanking 5.x updates are in another pending PR.
This port should be updated along with them so AqBanking support does not break.

Removed files:
files/patch-src-gnome-utils-gnc-html-graph-gog.c (patch applied upstream)

How-To-Repeat: Use attached (gzipped) diff.
